name: I'm on a rocky strand
hints: A rocky shore with an ancient staircase and a stone Goddess statue. Both are significant.
GO STAIRCASE to climb the long staircase toward the sacred temple above. Examine the stone Goddess.
The staircase leads up to the temple complex. Go SOUTH to reach a grassy plain where you can dig. The stone Goddess is part of the island's mythology.
notes: Rocky strand (shore) with a long staircase leading to the temple and a stone Goddess statue. GO STAIRCASE leads to room 20 (the staircase itself). South leads to a grassy plain (room 32) where digging is productive. This island is reached by sailing to the rocky strand sea zone.
